form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 0.6 len behind Our Boy Tom with 58.5kg at $1.60. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Moree Ctry Mdn on March 17 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Breukelen carrying 58kg at $5.50. Leading prospect.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months struggled in the run home; 8th of 10 at Scone Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, slow going 9 len behind Oakfield Alaska with 57kg at $61. Previously second-up second last of 7 at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn on July 27 over 1280m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Snap Decision carrying 56.5kg at $15. Still early in the prep and is open to improvement.
